working_on: Issue close-out campaign C3: historical full-encoded-path wings deep cleanup. Close Issue #41 by extending prune_mempalace.py with --apply-historical-paths mode (sibling to existing --audit-historical-paths), running signal-probe per wing, then bulk-deleting the ~37,634 inaccessible drawers across 9 historical wings (with selective preservation of any high-signal drawers). Direct chromadb-sqlite access bypasses the upstream wing-filter validator per the S-0084 mempalace_rebuild_hnsw template.
declared_scope: Investigate access path (re-confirm S-0084 direct-sqlite pattern works); per-wing signal probe; extend prune_mempalace.py with apply mode (dry-run default, --execute required, pre-flight backup gated, shape-mismatch refuse, optional --preserve-ids); ≥6 new pytests; pre-flight backup palace.S-0092-pre-c3; user destructive-action confirmation before execute; verify post-state via mempalace repair-status + probe_palace.py; close Issue #41; standard shutdown. phase: NA-engine-apparatus
